# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-deployment
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 2000
        fsGroup: 2000
      containers:
      - name: processor
        image: my-batch-image:latest
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
        args:
        - |
          echo "Starting batch job"
          python process_data.py
          echo "Batch job completed"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 2000
        volumeMounts:
        - name: temp-storage
          mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
      - name: temp-storage
        emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Always

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-job
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 2000
        fsGroup: 2000
      containers:
      - name: processor
        image: my-batch-image:latest
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
        args:
        - |
          echo "Starting batch job"
          python process_data.py
          echo "Batch job completed"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 2000
        volumeMounts:
        - name: temp-storage
          mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
      - name: temp-storage
        emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Never
